[Ur]erReport/

# Asset store packages can be re-downloaded; ignoring them saves space
# (Uncomment the line below if you want to exclude downloaded Asset Store plugins)
# /[Aa]ssets/AssetStoreTools*

# Autogenerated Visual Studio / JetBrains Rider project files
# (Unity will automatically regenerate these .csproj and .sln files anyway!)

/*.unityproj
/*.sln
/*.suo
/*.tmp
/*.user
/*.userprefs
/*.pidb
/*.booproj
/*.svd
/*.pdb
/*.opendb
/*.VC.db

# Unity crash reports and tracking

# OS-generated files (Mac / Windows specific hidden junk)
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db
Thumbs.db

# Local user adjustments to the Unity Editor layout

.vs/
.idea/

.consulo/
